workflow.name: Job Workflows
workflow.description: Planned inspection of a road asset

activities.name: Raise Inspection
activities.description: Creates a new Inspection Job and captures its opening data.
activities._comment: record_map:CREATE — surfaced at the GRID level (no anchor). On submit, attributes whose key matches a custom_field key are written to the new Record. ACCEPTABLE BEHAVIOUR, DO NOT FIX: 'raise_notes' has no matching custom field, so it is captured then silently dropped on create — intended (SDM update 1.9.3 rule 2), not a bug; do not add a raise_notes field or error. ACCEPTABLE BEHAVIOUR, DO NOT FIX: 'status' is not captured here and no hook runs this cut, so it stays 'Raised' permanently — intended; do not add a non-activity write path to change it. See POC1_Runtime_UI_Scope.md §7a.

activities.name: Record Finding
activities.description: Capture inspection findings against the Job.

after_hook._comment: Shape only — NOT executed this cut. When hooks are staged in, this would conditionally spawn a Hazard Record. Bodies/semantics deferred (SDM 1.6/1.7).

commands.action: <deferred> create Record "Hazard", linked to this Job

after_hook._comment: Shape only — NOT executed this cut. Would set anchor Record status = Complete once hooks are staged in.
